title: Brankss/Penumbra
summary: Deep web research without leaving fingerprints.

title: Mohar7/sovereign-rag
summary: Local-first GraphRAG: Milvus hybrid (dense+BM25) + Neo4j local-search + cross-encoder rerank + contextual retrieval. Local-dev runs end-to-end on Ollama with no paid APIs; CI integration tier uses Ollama Cloud + OpenAI embeddings.

title: felixgeelhaar/nomi
summary: Local-first, state-driven AI agent platform. Plan-review before execution, capability-gated tools, BYO LLM (Ollama / Anthropic / OpenAI). Tauri desktop + Go runtime.

title: ScottishSaint/ollama-api-pool
summary: 🚀 Simplify API management with Ollama API Pool, a robust solution for seamless integration and optimized performance in your projects.

title: Ahkeratmehilaiset/waggledance-swarm
summary: Local-first AI runtime that routes 10k+ solver descriptors at warm p99 0.05 ms (1000/1000 hits, zero fallback) and spawns 1004 live agent clones in 120 s. Hex-mesh routing, MAGMA-audited provenance, agent-bridge autonomy fabric. Profile S (fully offline) or Profile L (opt-in cloud). BUSL.

title: soyalexisortiz/TDYCODER
summary: 🤖 Enhance coding with TDYCODER, an AI-powered editor offering local LLM models for private, offline support and advanced features in a sleek environment.

title: Saritaa2710/SurfSense
summary: 🤖 Enhance your research with SurfSense, a customizable AI agent that connects to multiple platforms for smarter, effective information retrieval.

title: JehanneDussert/govllm
summary: Continuous LLM governance monitoring for regulated environments - EU AI Act, GDPR, ANSSI. Self-hosted, profile-driven, no data leaves your infrastructure.

title: Chris31372/better-chat
summary: 🤖 Build an AI chat app with multi-model support, secure user data isolation, and advanced features like model integration and persistent conversation management.

title: Hariprasadrio/OpenOfficeAI
summary: 🧠 Enhance your writing in OpenOffice with Ollama AI, an offline macro that connects to local language models for editing, summarizing, and translating text.

title: ghost146767/openai-agents-python
summary: 🤖 Build efficient multi-agent workflows with the OpenAI Agents SDK, supporting OpenAI APIs and 100+ other LLMs for flexible solutions.

title: byasincirakoglu/RSS-AI
summary: 📡 Automate RSS feeds, summarize articles using AI, and push updates to Telegram with a simple web interface and powerful backend.

title: BereketGet/Personal-WebPage
summary: 🌐 Showcase your professional skills with a responsive personal webpage featuring a dark mode toggle and elegant design for improved user experience.

title: vaibhavdev22/HackNode
summary: 🚀 Build and manage decentralized applications with HackNode, your go-to framework for seamless blockchain development and deployment.

title: arieltolazurita/demo-llm-integration
summary: 🛠️ Build a flexible integration layer for large language models using Strategy, Abstract Factory, and Adapter patterns in TypeScript for seamless runtime switching.

title: lumogis/lumogis
summary: Privacy-first personal AI. Semantic search across your files, session memory, and a human-in-the-loop agent model. Your data never leaves your machine.

title: vachhanidhyey/llm_intercept
summary: 🚀 Intercept and log LLM calls to build fine-tuning datasets for compact models, enabling cost-effective and efficient AI training.

title: sterlp/eclipse-peon-ai
summary: An Eclipse plugin that supports offline and online LLMs/AIs with an integration into eclipse itself. Based on langchain4j including support for Ollama, LM Studio, Claude, Mistral, github copilot etc. Offline or online as we like.

title: miurla/morphic
summary: An AI-powered search engine with a generative UI
